parsed_output.justification: The players reached a consensus to vote for Caitlynn based on a sequence of role claims. Alana claimed to be the Troublemaker and Mitchell claimed to be the Robber. Mitchell explained that he robbed Caitlynn (who he claimed was a Werewolf), and then Alana swapped them, which according to his logic, made Caitlynn the Werewolf again. Although Mike also claimed to be a Werewolf, he agreed with the group's decision to vote for Caitlynn.
